---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose an improvement or new section for the template or documentation
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or need

Describe what problem this proposal solves or what need it covers.

## Proposal

Description of the improvement: what to add or change and why it improves the project.

## Alternatives considered

Other options evaluated and why the main proposal is preferred.

## Additional context

References, examples from other projects, or relevant details.
